Quick site update

August 23, 2011

I wanted to give a quick update on all things End On End:

Today, I redirected the entire end-on-end.com domain to this site in order to consolidate my blogging efforts.

I also added a link to my Tumblr page on the left navigation (Tumblelog) and set that URL to be tumblr.endonend.org. Everything I used to post on end-on-end.com will go there, so if you were interested in any of that, I will be posting there as well.

I also updated my RSS feeds to reflect these changes, so if you have subscribed via RSS,. please updated your feeds!

  • The feed for this site can now be accessed through this URL: http://feeds.feedburner.com/EndOnEndOrg

  • The feed for my Tumblelog can be accessed through this URL: http://feeds.feedburner.com/EndOnEnd

That’s all for now. More posts coming soon!

End on End @endonend
